channel.title: releases on Drupal WxT
channel.description: Recent content in releases on Drupal WxT

item.title: Releases
item.description: Important We try our best to have security releases of Drupal Core within 24-72 hours of being made available on drupal.org. The following table is a list of all the releases that are housed under the DrupalWxT organization on GitHub. Release Created Date Description 4.0.6 2021-05-31T11:41:34Z Features / Updates: Updates for WxT Update hook wxt_core_update_8403 #3214811 Updates for WxT Bootstrap (8.
